projects.title: Portfolio
projects.description: Here are some of the projects I've worked on. Each project showcases my skills and experience in different areas of software development.

tickets_app.name: Tickets App
tickets_app.description: A ticket management application that allows users to create, manage, and track support tickets. It includes features such as ticket creation, assignment, status tracking, and reporting.

functionalities.b: Secure authentication using JWT cookies only and refreshTokens
functionalities.c: Responsive design adapted to multiple devices
functionalities.d: Status update through drag and drop events
functionalities.e: Implementation of filters for better organization of tickets

tropix_ui.name: Tropix UI
tropix_ui.description: A design system and component library built with React and TypeScript. It provides a set of reusable UI components, such as buttons, forms, modals, and navigation elements, that can be easily integrated into web applications.

functionalities.a: Design of reusable and customizable components
functionalities.b: Clear and detailed documentation for each component
functionalities.c: Implementation of unit tests to ensure code quality
functionalities.d: Performance optimization through techniques like lazy loading and memoization
functionalities.e: Support for custom themes and accessibility
functionalities.f: CI/CD integration with GitHub Actions and Semantic Release

twitter_clone.name: Twitter Clone
twitter_clone.description: A social media platform that mimics the core features of Twitter, including user authentication, posting tweets, and real-time updates. It is built using React for the frontend and Firebase for the backend.

functionalities.b: Real-time posting and viewing of tweets using Firestore
functionalities.c: Responsive design for optimal experience on mobile and desktop devices

ip_tracker.name: IP Tracker
ip_tracker.description: A web application that allows users to track the location and details of an IP address. It uses a third-party API to fetch geolocation data and displays it on an interactive map.

functionalities.a: Integration with a geolocation API to fetch accurate location data
functionalities.b: Visualization of the location on an interactive map using Leaflet
functionalities.c: Responsive design for optimal experience on mobile and desktop devices
